task_completion.description: Create the required layers with correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel in LibreCAD shows 'STEEL' (cyan), 'HOLES' (yellow), and 'MARK' (red).

task_completion.description: Draw the chamfered rectangular plate on the STEEL layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cyan outline of a rectangle with all four corners chamfered (cut at an angle) is visible in the main drawing area.

task_completion.description: Draw six bolt holes on the HOLES layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Six yellow circles are visible inside the plate, arranged symmetrically in 2 rows and 3 columns.

task_completion.description: Add the text 'GP-1' on the MARK layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'GP-1' in red color is visible in the center of the drawing.
The LibreCAD window title bar displays 'gusset_plate_gp1.dxf' or a save dialog shows this filename being saved in the /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreCAD's menus, toolbars, and drawing area, rather than a terminal window running a script.

integrity.description: The drawing was created step-by-step in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate steps of the drawing process (e.g., drawing lines, applying chamfers, placing circles) are visible across the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script or external tool to generate the DXF file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal showing ezdxf or similar scripting libraries is used to bypass the CAD GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 300x200mm plate with 40mm chamfers on all corners on a 'STEEL' layer (Cyan). Six 22mm diameter holes (11mm radius) must be placed on a 'HOLES' layer (Yellow) in a 2x3 grid at X=50, 150, 250 and Y=50, 150. Text 'GP-1' must be placed on a 'MARK' layer (Red) at (150, 100). The file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/gusset_plate_gp1.dxf.
